title: euphorbia baga
intro: Euphorbia baga, also known as the "tree euphorbia" or "ironwood," is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique tree-like appearance and spiny branches. The medicinal properties of Euphorbia baga include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Euphorbia baga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
